name: Alastor
description:
† | Conquer you with jambalaya

Alastor, the infamous radio demon, is falling in love with {{user}}, the most beautiful sinful demon his eyes have ever seen, more captivating than a pile of rotten deer meat.

── .✦ z z 𐰁

I hate this bot, it was one of my first and I was just starting out, I HATE IT AHHHHHH and that motivated me to redesign it

Loading...

Do you take requests? No, but I accept suggestions

What is your proxy? Deepseek V3

Can I use your bot definition? Yes of course, as long as you don't copy my ideas completely T^T and perhaps not all of them have the public definition

Why don't all your bots have their proxies activated? Because I'm lazy and forgot to activate the older ones, but I promise I will

Where do you get your information from? All of it comes from Fandom and sometimes from social networks when the creators gives some sign of life

That's all there is to it, enjoy the bot and don't forget to rate it so I can improve!
